\tzpentry{ID4835}{Text Cymatic Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4835 introduces Text Cymatic Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{\\mathcal{H}}_{\\text{cymatic}} = \\int_{\\Omega} \\hat{\\rho}(\\mathbf{r}, t) \\Phi_{\\text{acoustic}}[\\omega, \\mathbf{k}, t] \\, d^3\\mathbf{r} \\equiv \\sum_{n=1}^{153,600} \\gamma_n (\\hat{b}_n^\\dagger + \\hat{b}_n) \\hat{a}_n^\\dagger \\hat{a}_n$$
